'''hangodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylosidase|xylosidase]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ng-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylosidase|xylosidase]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hangodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hængedeth|hængedeth]] || [[word:hængedej|hængedej]] || [[word:hængedesh|hængedesh]] || [[word:hængede|hængede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hangongodoth|hangongodoth]] || [[word:hangongodoj|hangongodoj]] || [[word:hangongodosh|hangongodosh]] || [[word:hangongodo|hangongodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hangodoth|hangodoth]] || [[word:hangodoj|hangodoj]] || [[word:hangodosh|hangodosh]] || [[word:hangodo|hangodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hangofdoth|hangofdoth]] || [[word:hangofdoj|hangofdoj]] || [[word:hangofdosh|hangofdosh]] || [[word:hangofdof|hangofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hangodotho|hangodotho]] || [[word:hangodojo|hangodojo]] || [[word:hangodosho|hangodosho]] || [[word:hangodoko|hangodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hangodoth|hangodoth]] || [[word:hangodoj|hangodoj]] || [[word:hangodosh|hangodosh]] || [[word:hangodo|hangodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hangodothol|hangodothol]] || [[word:hangodojol|hangodojol]] || [[word:hangodoshol|hangodoshol]] || [[word:hangodokol|hangodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hangodothotho|hangodothotho]] || [[word:hangodojojo|hangodojojo]] || [[word:hangodoshosho|hangodoshosho]] || [[word:hangodoko|hangodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hangodothon|hangodothon]] || [[word:hangodojon|hangodojon]] || [[word:hangodoshon|hangodoshon]] || [[word:hangodokon|hangodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hangodothoro|hangodothoro]] || [[word:hangodojoro|hangodojoro]] || [[word:hangodoshoro|hangodoshoro]] || [[word:hangodokoro|hangodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
